briefs.title: Lottery ticket sellers must complete BC training course every 60 days starting April 2026
briefs.summary: A new BC regulation takes effect April 13, 2026, requiring the BC Lottery Corporation to run a mandatory training course for lottery ticket retailers and their managers at least once every 60 days. The course covers how to use ticket-reading equipment, check that buyers are at least 19 years old, and follow proper selling and redemption procedures.
briefs.action_required: Ensure all staff who sell or redeem lottery tickets are enrolled in the BC Lottery Corporation training course before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Lottery Corporation Training Program Regulation takes effect
